parameters.content:
### New Lead Form Submission

Serves an n8n-hosted form (Email, Company, Score). Each submission becomes one execution.

Next: Score the Lead

### Score the Lead

Custom JavaScript: Score each lead 0-100 from simple heuristics

Next: Assign Round-Robin Owner

### Assign Round-Robin Owner

Custom JavaScript: Round-robin owner assignment

Next: Route by Heat

### Route by Heat

Routes each item to one of 3 lanes: hot, warm + fallback.

Ports: ①→ Hot → HubSpot + Instant Ping · ②→ Warm → Drip via Gmail · ③→ Cold → Park in Nurture List

### Hot → HubSpot + Instant Ping

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

Next: Notify Assigned Owner

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Notify Assigned Owner

gmail — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Combine Lead Paths

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Warm → Drip via Gmail

gmail — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Combine Lead Paths

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Cold → Park in Nurture List

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

Next: Combine Lead Paths

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

nodes.name: Note: Cold → Park in Nurture List

parameters.content:
### Combine Lead Paths

Rejoins 3 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

# Capture demo requests with HubSpot and Gmail end to end

**Pattern:** Lead Capture & Routing · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Form

## What it does
Capture demo requests with HubSpot and Gmail end to end. It starts from a hosted form submission.

## Why it exists
Manual capture forms is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
New Lead Form Submission → Score the Lead → Assign Round-Robin Owner → Route by Heat → Hot → HubSpot + Instant Ping → Notify Assigned Owner → Combine Lead Paths

## Use it for
- Teams that want to lead capture & routing without manual effort
- Anyone automating capture forms in sales
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Scales without extra headcount
- Improves response time
- Standardizes the process every time

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2; HubSpot private-app token.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your capture forms process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
